notes: Captures the two-view layout and overall mantle/fin/arm silhouette of the input but collapses the individual arms into a single lumpy blob and lacks the anatomical specificity of an FAO plate.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles merged into a single contour instead of eight individuated arms plus two longer tentacles
no sucker rings or sucker rows along the arms
eye reduced to a dot rather than an almond-shaped eye with pupil
stray small circles/artifacts (bottom-left of upper view, near eye in lower view) that don't correspond to anything in the photo
stipple is randomly scattered rather than concentrated in the chromatophore-dense mantle and head regions visible in the photo
fin contour on the dorsal view is lumpy/wavy rather than the clean swept curve in the photo
weird hatched 'mouth' artifact on the lower view's eye region
linework is broken/dashed in places rather than confident continuous strokes typical of FAO plates
